notes: Static files can be deployed to GitHub Pages, Netlify, Vercel, or copied into WordPress after review.
Do not publish private source, credentials, rollback snapshots, signed URLs, or customer data.

visualGaps.policy: Reuse approved local assets first. Generate only these confirmed gaps.

gaps.need: Original offer-catalog hero image that shows multiple AI service lanes without exposing private IP.
gaps.prompt: Create a public-safe branded visual for offers / hero-background: Original offer-catalog hero image that shows multiple AI service lanes without exposing private IP. Do not reveal private source code, credentials, production adapters, customer data, or internal receipts.

gaps.prompt: Create a public-safe branded visual for share-send-kit / social-share-card: Canva branded share graphic for forwarding the portfolio to buyers and partners. Do not reveal private source code, credentials, production adapters, customer data, or internal receipts.
